expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly verifies this: it states Phase 7 produces `developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md` “derived from P1 and `[ANALOG-GATE]` scenarios” and cites `skill_snapshot/scripts/lib/finalPlanSummary.mjs` which “extracts rows where scenario lines are either `<P1>` or contain `[ANALOG-GATE]`” and writes `developer_smoke_test_<featureId>.md`.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md sets “Primary phase under test: Phase 7”. result.md section “Alignment with primary phase: Phase 7” ties developer smoke checklist generation to Phase 7 responsibilities and to `finalPlanSummary.mjs` invoked in Phase 7, generating `context/final_plan_summary_<feature-id>.md` and `context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md` as Phase 7 artifacts.
